episodes.title: Real Stories from former cult members!!
WHAT IS THIS CULT HIDING?!
episodes.description:
Trigger warning. This episode contains disturbing details of the case that brought Remnant Fellowship into the limelight. 

This is part 3 of my “exposing Remnant Fellowship” series. 
#cult #remnantfellowship #investigate #crime #truecrime

episodes.title: “Members of Remnant Fellowship won’t like that I am saying this.” PART 2 - Cult Exposed
episodes.description:
In this documentary style series, Michael Black - formerly known as Michael Shamblin - opens up about his experience with Remnant Followship Church. 

In part 2, we talk about religious discrimination and the extreme control tactics that this cult uses to keep their members submissive. 

What’s terrifying is that this cult still operates today!

episodes.title: Cult Leader’s Son Breaks his Silence!! Part 1
episodes.description:
Michael Black, formerly known as Michael Shamblin, recounts some of his experiences as a former member of Remnant Church. Gwen Shamblin, who amassed a worldwide following through her faith based eating teachings, has been the subject of multiple documentaries, court cases and intense scrutiny.

This is part 1 of a 3 part series, with her own son opening up in this intense interview. 
#cult #documentary #truecrime #gwenshamblin #remnantchurch
